name: Oversized Everyday Hoodie
description: A buttery-soft heavyweight hoodie with a relaxed oversized fit, brushed interior, and a kangaroo pocket. Built for lazy Sundays, campus runs, and late-night takeout — somehow makes any outfit feel put together.

name: AeroBuds Pro Wireless Earbuds
description: Active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery with the charging case, transparency mode, and USB-C fast charging. Pair in two seconds and forget they're in your ears — the kind of audio upgrade you notice on day one.

name: Stonewashed Linen Throw Blanket
description: A cotton-linen blend throw in a soft oat tone, stonewashed for that perfectly lived-in feel. Drapes over a couch like it was styled by a magazine, feels like it's been yours for years.

name: Glow Routine Hydrating Serum
description: A lightweight hyaluronic acid + niacinamide serum that plumps, hydrates, and gives skin that 'did you just get back from vacation?' glow. Fragrance-free, non-comedogenic, layers under anything.

name: Trailrunner Performance Sneakers
description: A breathable mesh upper with a responsive cushioned midsole and all-terrain outsole. Light enough for a morning run, stable enough for a weekend hike. Breaks in on day one.

name: Relaxed Fit Cargo Pants
description: Wide-leg cargo pants with six roomy pockets, an adjustable drawcord waistband, and a streetwear-inspired drape. Heavy-duty cotton twill that softens with every wash.

name: Ribbed Turtleneck Sweater
description: A chunky ribbed-knit turtleneck in a neutral oat colorway. Oversized fit, dropped shoulders, and long enough to layer over anything — jeans, midi skirts, sweats.

name: Portable Mechanical Keyboard
description: A compact 65% wireless mechanical keyboard with tactile switches, per-key RGB, and up to 40 hours on a charge. Satisfying thock, zero wrist strain, fits in a backpack pocket.

name: Smart LED Desk Lamp
description: Touch-controlled LED desk lamp with stepless dimming, adjustable color temperature from warm to daylight, and a built-in USB charging port. Eye-friendly glow for late sessions.

name: Ceramic Pour Over Coffee Set
description: A minimalist matte ceramic pour-over dripper with a matching 12oz mug and a bamboo serving tray. The kind of slow coffee ritual that turns a Tuesday into a moment.

name: Linen Duvet Cover Set
description: Breathable stonewashed French linen duvet cover with two matching pillowcases in warm earthy tones. Gets softer every wash, looks like you styled it without trying.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Moisturizer
description: A lightweight daily moisturizer with 15% stabilized vitamin C, niacinamide, and hyaluronic acid. Evens tone, hydrates, and gives skin a visible glow in about two weeks.

name: Bamboo Charcoal Face Mask Set
description: A pack of 10 biodegradable sheet masks infused with bamboo charcoal, green tea extract, and hyaluronic acid. Detoxifying, hydrating, and genuinely fun to do on a Sunday.

name: Adjustable Resistance Band Set
description: A set of 5 resistance bands ranging from 10 to 50 lbs, with a door anchor, ankle straps, and a mesh carry bag. A full gym's worth of workouts that fits in a drawer.

name: Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: A 32oz double-wall vacuum-insulated bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12. Leak-proof lid, powder-coated grip finish, fits most car cup holders.

name: Wide Brim Bucket Hat
description: An unstructured wide-brim bucket hat in washed cotton canvas. Packable, lightweight, and shades your whole face without flattening your hair.

name: Vintage Wash Denim Jacket
description: A classic trucker-style denim jacket with a faded vintage wash, antique brass buttons, and a slightly boxy fit. Goes with literally everything you own.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: A slim 15W fast-charging Qi pad that works with any compatible phone or earbud case. Soft-touch surface, non-slip base, charges through most thin cases.

name: Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Over-ear wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, a 30-hour battery, memory-foam ear cushions, and a foldable design that fits in a backpack.

name: Scented Soy Candle Set
description: Three hand-poured soy-wax candles in amber jars — cedar, vanilla, and fresh linen. Long, clean burn and a scent that doesn't scream 'gift shop'.

name: Floating Wall Shelf Set
description: A set of three minimalist solid-wood floating shelves with hidden metal brackets. Installs in minutes, holds books, plants, and the occasional candle.

name: Retinol Night Repair Serum
description: A 0.5% encapsulated retinol serum buffered with peptides and ceramides. Smooths fine lines and wakes up tired skin overnight without redness or flaking.

name: Volumizing Hair Mousse
description: A lightweight styling mousse that lifts roots for natural-looking volume and a soft flexible hold. No crunch, no white flakes, no helmet hair.

name: Foam Roller Recovery Set
description: A high-density EVA foam roller bundled with a trigger-point massage ball and an illustrated stretching guide. Chases out soreness after leg day in minutes.

name: Lightweight Running Cap
description: A moisture-wicking running cap with a pre-curved brim, reflective accents on the back, and an adjustable strap. Stays put through an 8-mile tempo.

name: Oversized Graphic Tee
description: A relaxed-fit heavyweight cotton tee with a vintage-inspired faded graphic print. Dropped shoulders, boxy cut, the exact kind of shirt you reach for twice a week.

name: High Waist Yoga Leggings
description: Buttery 4-way-stretch high-waist leggings with a hidden waistband pocket and fully squat-proof knit. Compression where you want it, soft everywhere else.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: A compact waterproof speaker with 360° sound, 12 hours of battery, and a carabiner clip. Loud enough for a kitchen, a backyard, or a pickup soccer game.

name: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
description: A brushed-aluminum 7-in-1 hub with 4K HDMI, two USB-A, SD and microSD card readers, and 100W power-delivery pass-through. One cable, the whole desk.

name: Bamboo Cutting Board Set
description: A trio of organic bamboo cutting boards in graduated sizes with deep juice grooves and built-in handles. Knife-friendly, dishwasher-safe, perfectly stackable.

name: Weighted Blanket
description: A 15lb premium weighted blanket with evenly distributed glass-bead filling and a removable machine-washable minky cover. The calm hits in about a minute.

name: SPF 50 Tinted Moisturizer
description: A lightweight tinted moisturizer with broad-spectrum SPF 50, hyaluronic acid, and antioxidants. Evens tone, hydrates, and protects without the white cast.

name: Exfoliating Sugar Scrub
description: A brown sugar + coconut oil body scrub with vitamin E that polishes skin soft without stripping it. Smells like a bakery, rinses off clean.

name: Yoga Mat with Carrying Strap
description: A 6mm extra-grippy non-slip yoga mat with printed alignment lines and an included woven carrying strap. Cushions knees on poses, doesn't slide on hardwood.

name: Jump Rope with Counter
description: A speed jump rope with a built-in digital rep counter, an adjustable steel cable, and foam-grip handles on ball bearings. Turns any driveway into a cardio session.

name: Linen Button Down Shirt
description: A relaxed-fit summer linen shirt with a subtle slub texture, a single chest pocket, and roll-up sleeves with button tabs. Breezes through August with its shoulders back.

name: Fleece Zip Up Hoodie
description: A midweight fleece zip-up with a kangaroo pocket, elastic ribbed cuffs, and a cozy brushed interior. The going-to-the-coffee-shop hoodie that actually survives winter.

name: Smart Plug 4 Pack
description: A four-pack of Wi-Fi smart plugs compatible with Alexa and Google Home. Schedule lights, monitor energy use from your phone, and finally automate the coffee maker.

name: Webcam 1080p HD
description: A plug-and-play 1080p webcam with a built-in stereo microphone, auto light correction, and a privacy shutter. Makes any call look meeting-ready in three seconds.

name: Macrame Wall Hanging
description: A handwoven bohemian macrame wall hanging in natural cotton rope with a 24" wooden dowel. Instant warmth on any empty wall, packs flat, ships knotted.

name: Aroma Diffuser
description: An ultrasonic essential-oil diffuser with a 7-color LED mood light, auto shut-off when dry, and whisper-quiet operation. Runs for 10 hours on a single fill.

name: Jade Roller and Gua Sha Set
description: An authentic jade facial roller and gua sha stone set for morning lymphatic drainage and de-puffing. Ten minutes a day makes your face look like you slept for nine hours.

name: Curl Defining Cream
description: A frizz-control curl cream with shea butter and argan oil that shapes defined, bouncy curls without any crunch. Works on 2A through 4C, no flakes.

name: Gym Duffel Bag
description: A water-resistant gym duffel with a ventilated wet-dry compartment, a dedicated shoe pocket, and an adjustable padded shoulder strap. Fits everything for a full week.

name: Cooling Towel 3 Pack
description: Three instant-cooling microfiber towels that activate with water and stay cold for hours. Machine-washable and reusable forever — trail runs, hot yoga, sidelines.

name: Pleated Wide Leg Trousers
description: High-waist pleated trousers in a flowy drapey fabric with deep side pockets and an elastic back waistband. Dresses up a tee, dresses down a blazer.

name: Cropped Puffer Vest
description: A lightweight quilted puffer vest with a cropped silhouette, a two-way front zip, and two hand pockets. Core warmth without the sleeves, shoulder season MVP.

name: Digital Drawing Tablet
description: A pressure-sensitive drawing tablet with 8,192 levels, a battery-free stylus, and six replacement nibs. Works with Photoshop, Procreate, and pretty much everything.

name: Portable Power Bank 20000mAh
description: A slim 20,000mAh power bank with dual USB-A, USB-C fast charge, and a 4-dot LED battery indicator. Enough juice for a laptop top-up and about five phone charges.

name: Countertop Compost Bin
description: A brushed stainless-steel countertop compost bin with a charcoal filter in the lid to trap odors. Holds about a week of scraps, looks intentional on the counter.

name: Himalayan Salt Lamp
description: A natural pink Himalayan salt lamp on a solid wood base with a dimmer-switch cord. Puts out a warm amber glow that instantly makes a room feel like an evening.

name: Peptide Eye Cream
description: A firming eye cream with a tripeptide complex plus caffeine to reduce morning puffiness and visibly soften dark circles. Absorbs quickly, sits well under makeup.

name: Dry Shampoo Spray
description: An invisible dry shampoo spray that absorbs oil at the roots and adds volume without leaving any white cast or powdery residue. Smells clean, not chemical.

name: Swim Goggles Pro
description: Anti-fog, UV-protective swim goggles with an adjustable nose bridge, soft silicone seal, and a wide peripheral view. Stays on through flip turns without leaking.

name: Hiking Poles Collapsible
description: A pair of lightweight aluminum trekking poles that collapse down to fit in a daypack, with natural cork grips and adjustable wrist straps. Saves your knees on the way down.

name: Satin Slip Dress
description: A midi-length satin slip dress with adjustable spaghetti straps, a cowl V-neck, and a subtle sheen. Throws on with sneakers, layers under a blazer, goes anywhere.

name: Sherpa Lined Flannel Shirt
description: A heavyweight cotton flannel shirt lined with plush sherpa, button front, and dual chest pockets. Functions as both a shirt and a jacket on a 45° morning.

name: Mini Projector Portable
description: A pocket-sized 1080p projector with a built-in speaker, HDMI and USB inputs, and a throw big enough for a 120-inch movie on any blank wall.

name: Cable Management Box
description: A large cable-management box with a flip-top lid that hides power strips, router bricks, and octopus cords. Turns the corner behind your desk from ugly to invisible.

name: Cast Iron Skillet 12 inch
description: A 12-inch pre-seasoned cast iron skillet that works on gas, electric, induction, and open fire. Gets better with every sear — a genuinely lifetime pan.

name: Blackout Curtains Set
description: A pair of thermal-insulated blackout curtains that block 99% of light, dampen outside noise, and take the edge off drafty windows in winter.

name: Konjac Facial Sponge Set
description: A set of four natural konjac sponges — pure, charcoal, green tea, and red clay — for a different gentle cleanse every day of the week.

name: Tinted Lip Oil
description: A nourishing sheer tinted lip oil with vitamin E and jojoba that leaves lips glossy, hydrated, and a pinch more flushed than they were.

name: Ankle Weights Set
description: A pair of adjustable ankle weights, 1–5 lbs each, with soft neoprene sleeves and velcro straps. Tacks onto a walk or pilates class for a sneaky extra burn.

name: Sport Sunscreen SPF 70
description: A water-resistant sport sunscreen in a non-greasy SPF 70 formula. Reef-safe, doesn't sting eyes when you sweat, rubs in without a ghost cast.

name: Ribbed Tank Top 3 Pack
description: A set of three fitted ribbed-cotton tank tops in black, white, and heather gray. Stretchy, breathable, and the kind of wardrobe staple you restock annually.

name: Trench Coat Classic
description: A double-breasted mid-length trench in weatherproof cotton gabardine with a tie belt, shoulder storm flap, and deep hand pockets. The coat you own for a decade.

name: Ring Light 12 inch
description: A 12-inch LED ring light with a folding tripod stand, spring-loaded phone holder, and three color-temperature settings. The difference between a webcam call and a studio shot.

name: Surge Protector 8 Outlet
description: An eight-outlet surge protector with four USB ports, a 6-foot braided cord, and 2,400 joules of spike protection. Turns one wall outlet into your entire battle station.

name: French Press Coffee Maker
description: A 34oz heat-resistant borosilicate-glass French press in a polished stainless-steel frame with a double-wall mesh filter. Richer cup than any drip, fewer moving parts than anything.

name: Decorative Throw Pillow Set
description: A curated set of four throw pillows in complementary textures — boucle, linen, velvet, woven cotton — with hidden zipper covers and plush inserts included.

name: Niacinamide Pore Serum
description: A 10% niacinamide + 1% zinc serum that visibly minimizes pores and keeps midday shine in check. Fragrance-free, plays well under any moisturizer.

name: Scalp Massager Shampoo Brush
description: A soft silicone scalp massager that lifts product buildup, boosts circulation, and genuinely feels amazing in the shower. The sub-$10 upgrade that actually upgrades you.

name: Pull Up Bar Doorframe
description: A no-screw doorframe pull-up bar that leverages instead of drills, with multiple grip positions and a 300lb load rating. Installs in a minute, comes down just as fast.

name: Compression Knee Sleeves
description: A pair of 7mm compression knee sleeves that stabilize joints for running, heavy squats, and long hikes. Stays put without pinching behind the knee.

name: Oversized Denim Overalls
description: Relaxed-fit denim overalls with adjustable metal-buckle straps, a roomy chest pocket, and a wide-leg silhouette. Goes with sneakers, boots, or bare feet in the garden.

name: Knit Beanie Cable Pattern
description: A chunky cable-knit beanie in a soft acrylic-wool blend with a slouchy fit and a folded ribbed cuff. Comes in oat, rust, sage, and charcoal — one size stretches for most.

name: Laptop Stand Adjustable
description: A brushed-aluminum laptop stand with six height settings and a hinged base that folds flat into a laptop bag. Lifts your screen to eye level, lets air flow underneath.

name: True Wireless Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with an 8-hour single-charge battery (32 with the case), touch controls, IPX5 sweat resistance, and low-latency pairing. Budget price, not-budget sound.

name: Acacia Wood Serving Board
description: A large food-safe acacia wood serving and charcuterie board with a deep juice groove and cutout side handles. Grain pattern is beautiful; it's also a real cutting board.

name: Linen Storage Baskets Set
description: A nesting set of three collapsible linen storage baskets with leather cutout handles and a sturdy wire frame. Hides the chaos in closets, shelves, and laundry rooms.

name: Hyaluronic Acid Lip Plumper
description: A clear, cinnamon-tingle lip plumper with hyaluronic acid and peptides that leaves lips visibly fuller and glossier. No needles, no stinging, wears smooth under lipstick.

name: Coffee Scrub Body Polish
description: An energizing ground-coffee and coconut-oil body scrub that polishes skin, softens the look of cellulite, and wakes you up faster than your actual coffee.

name: Ab Wheel Roller
description: A dual-wheel ab roller with non-slip textured handles and a thick foam knee pad. Humbling on day one, a core-building staple by day ten.

name: Pickleball Paddle Set
description: A beginner-friendly pickleball kit with two graphite-face paddles, four outdoor balls, and a zippered carry bag. Everything two people need to get hooked in one afternoon.
